Call DEGs with DESeq2 and write per-contrast DEG files for HARMONIC

Source: R/HARMONIC_DEGcalling.R
MANGO_DEGcalling.Rd

Runs DESeq2 for multiple contrasts defined by mango_design, writes normalized counts and DEG result tables, and appends selected DEG file paths into input_DEG_list.txt under filepath.

Usage

HARMONIC_DEGcalling(
  filepath,
  type = "standard",
  full_condition,
  number_of_rep,
  mango_design
)

Arguments

filepath

Directory path containing input files (expects count/RAWcount.txt).

type

DEG calling mode. One of "standard" or "broad". "standard" uses adjp=0.05 and FC=2; "broad" uses adjp=0.05 and FC=1.5.

full_condition

Character vector of condition names (must match sample condition labels).

number_of_rep

Integer vector of replicate counts for each condition in full_condition.

mango_design

Character vector specifying contrasts and direction to export. Each element should be formatted like "<objective>_<control>_<trend>", where trend is one of "UP", "DOWN", "SIG".

Value

Invisibly returns NULL. Results are written to files under filepath.

On this page
